subcodes.first_line: The regions of the world and the cities and villages, both East and West, are encompassed by the darkness of ignorance and rebellion, the darkness of heedlessness and arrogance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اقاليم عالم و مدن و قری در شرق و غرب محاط به ظلمات جهل و طغيان، ظلمت نادانی ظلمت استکبار
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual springtime
